[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Fri Aug 12, 2005 3:57 pm It's not 15 minutes, it's less than 2 minutes and it's befre the beginning of the movie. AA was thinking that it's a trailer of Love&Pop, I've nrever seen it, but it can be, I don't know. You have to wait 45 seconds before to download the video and after that you have to click on the written in high. Doesn'it work? I've try it and it works. if still doesn't it work tell me, I will re-upload the video. As I said in the other topic I'm quite sure that you ahve seen this video, it's also in the trailers of the panini's disk, so I think that it's just a strange trailer.

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Fri Aug 12, 2005 6:07 pm IIRC, this is a "trailer" made from video that was shot by Anno with the intention of being included in EoE as an extended sequence illustrating a world without Shinji Ikari. (The approximate plaecment of this sequence would have been right around the area where actual live footage is included in the film). The women you see are actually understood to be Rei, Asuka, I think Ritsuko, and I think Touji pops up in there... if not there, then in the original segment from which this trailer was made. There would have been something about Asuka and Touji going out, Rei working with Ritsuko... or something completely different from what I'm remembering--I don't know. Anyway, the idea was scrapped, and instead replaced with a shorter montage of live footage of things like swings, trains, a cat, the anime versions of the girls in the real world, a movie theater, etc. Someone else probably knows the reason why the change was made, if it was for any reason other than (good) artistic sensibility. (That original "alternate universe" idea probably would have ruined the entire film.)

[]:             Quote Post by drinian » Fri Aug 12, 2005 6:54 pm [url]http://www.evaotaku.com/html/liveaction.html[/url] has the information on the cut Live Action sequence. I believe EM has a copy of it stashed somewhere as well -- it was included on the Eva Renewal DVDs in Japan, I believe. But what you're seeing is just a trailer.

[]:             Quote Post by Ryo » Fri Aug 12, 2005 7:41 pm Like, tah-daah. [url]http://www.evamonkey.com/End.of.Evangelion.-.Alternate.Live.Action.Sequence.EN_V2.%5BRLP%5D.avi[/url]

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Fri Aug 12, 2005 9:03 pm The video I meant as the other trailer that I saw on my video version of EOE was of a little girl running and the BGM was another Bach song, not on Eva dyscography, whose name I will only get when I listen again to my collection of Hopkinson Smith's Bach in Lute CD's. I just tried to make a rip of that part of the video, but the CD (which is like 5 years old) doesn't want to copy it. Does anybody know of a good program to copy files from a damaged CD? This media is so short lived... can't trust it anymore.

[]:             Quote Post by drinian » Fri Aug 12, 2005 9:11 pm AchtungAffen wrote: The video I meant as the other trailer that I saw on my video version of EOE was of a little girl running and the BGM was another Bach song, not on Eva dyscography, whose name I will only get when I listen again to my collection of Hopkinson Smith's Bach in Lute CD's.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Sat Aug 13, 2005 11:10 am Thanks to everyone, so it's a trailler of the cutted live action sequence. I agree with Drinian, maybe it's the videoclip#1 (but the file it's L&P5.rm), the music in the background is "Partita III fÃ¼r Violino solo E-dur, BWV.1006 3.Gavotte in Rondo", at least I think, it's on Death&Rebirth OST, but I'm not sure, i'm not an expert of classical (but I love it).

[]:             Quote Post by TheBlueTree » Sat Aug 13, 2005 11:49 am Hexon.Arq wrote: IIRC, this is a "trailer" made from video that was shot by Anno with the intention of being included in EoE as an extended sequence illustrating a world without Shinji Ikari. The women you see are actually understood to be Rei, Asuka, I think Ritsuko, and I think Touji pops up in there... if not there, then in the original segment from which this trailer was made. There would have been something about Asuka and Touji going out, Rei working with Ritsuko... or something completely different from what I'm remembering--I don't know. Anyway, the idea was scrapped, and instead replaced with a shorter montage of live footage of things like swings, trains, a cat, the anime versions of the girls in the real world, a movie theater, etc. Someone else probably knows the reason why the change was made, if it was for any reason other than (good) artistic sensibility. (That original "alternate universe" idea probably would have ruined the entire film.)

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Sat Aug 13, 2005 1:03 pm Yep, the video I meant had the Gavotta in Rondeau. I'm still downloading real media alternative to watch them. BTW, nobody still can recommend me a program to get data from a damaged CD? I could try to make another version in AVI of that clip.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Sat Aug 13, 2005 1:43 pm Well, you can try to use another CD-reader or you can try to make a copy with alcohol 120% with the damaged CD settings, but I'm not sure that it will work... any other suggestions? P.S.: but what is it your CD? a VCD?

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Sat Aug 13, 2005 5:13 pm It's a regular CDR. I tried two readers but won't work, cyclic redundancy error. I'll try alcohol then.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Sat Aug 13, 2005 7:23 pm Try the safedisc settings and burn the image in DAO/SAO mode, but if you're not able to play the CD it will hard to make a copy..... but just try it (it's better that you use a CD-RW).

Article: EoE before the beginning what is it this video
 a "trailer" made from video that was shot by Anno with the intention of being included in EoE as an extended sequence illustrating a world without Shinji Ikari. (The approximate plaecment of this sequence would have been right around the area where actual live footage is included in the film). The women you see are actually understood to be Rei, Asuka, I think Ritsuko, and I think Touji pops up in there... if not there, then in the original segment from which this trailer was made. There would have been something about Asuka and Touji going out, Rei working with Ritsuko... or something completely different from what I'm remembering--I don't know. Anyway, the idea was scrapped, and instead replaced with a shorter montage of live footage of things like swings, trains, a cat, the anime versions of the girls in the real world, a movie theater, etc. Someone else probably knows the reason why the change was made, if it was for any reason other than (good) artistic sensibility. (That original "alternate universe" idea probably would have ruined the entire film.)

[]:             Quote Post by drinian » Fri Aug 12, 2005 6:54 pm [url]http://www.evaotaku.com/html/liveaction.html[/url] has the information on the cut Live Action sequence. I believe EM has a copy of it stashed somewhere as well -- it was included on the Eva Renewal DVDs in Japan, I believe. But what you're seeing is just a trailer.
